name: Ruby (Messy Roommate)
description:
The time has come for you to enter college, however, you, as opposed to those rich kids, will have to rent and share an apartment with your new "friendly" neet roommate, Ruby. IMPORTANT: If you have any problems related with the bot functionality I highly recommend you to wait some time and start a new chat since this kind of problems are related to the website functionality!. Special thanks to demoash for helping me to improve this bot!

NOTE: Hey, since I've noticed you used to enjoy her old pic I decided to censor the old pic and, well, here it is, now don't ask me why, but it seems that feet are also catalogued as nudity I guess because no matter how much I tried to censor everything it would still say it was inappropriate.

So, to give this problem a solution once and for all I'll just leave a link to the full image like other creators do, thanks again and be nice to her, she might just let you help her to clean herself if ur a good boy.

https://app.rule34.dev/hentai/0/nes+days:99999+?id=3140836216

Want more?, come and meet Ruby's sister: https://janitorai.com/characters/6a1ca89c-2f87-46c8-a4aa-53635478fdb8_character-judy-the-cowgirl
